channel.title: Software on cafeTheatre
channel.description: Recent content in Software on cafeTheatre

item.title: Meansure pps or bandwidth on the network interface
item.description: Measure Packets per Second on an Interface #!/bin/bash if [ -z "$1" ]; then echo echo usage: $0 network-interface echo echo e.

item.title: Smbpasswd
item.description: Samba passwd smbpasswd and tdbsam If you use “passdb backend = smbpasswd” in your smb.conf you must convert your system-user accounts to smbpasswd:

item.title: Sphinx
item.description: Install Sphinx First you need to install Python on your windows. When you finished that,you can install sphinx use this command: :

item.title: Toolbox
item.description: awk grep xxxxxx access.log.2 | awk -F '[ ]' '{print $4}' | sort -u | wc -l awk -F '[ ]' '{print $4}' access.

item.title: CSS
item.description: CSS Property property value descrition white-space normal Sequences of whitespace are collapsed. Newline characters in the source are handled the same as other whitespace.

item.title: Git
item.description: Quick Command git init git add . git commit -m 'first commit' git remote add origin git@github.com:jack/jack.github.io.git git push [-f] origin master Remove all git commits and records git checkout --orphan newBranch git add -A # Add all files and commit them git commit git branch -D master # Deletes the master branch git branch -m master # Rename the current branch to master git push -f origin master # Force push master branch to github git prune --progress git gc --aggressive --prune=all Truncate git history #!

item.title: Dynamic port forwarding with SSH and SOCKS5
item.description: In this article i collected all the necessary information and useful tips to create SSH tunnels between hosts in order to protect internet traffic with an encrypted layer.

item.title: Markdown syntax guide and writing on MWeb
item.description: Philosophy Markdown is intended to be as easy-to-read and easy-to-write as is feasible. Readability, however, is emphasized above all else.
